Modifications

Generalize decoding seq_len

sglang.title: refactor: replace worker pool with semaphore-based concurrency in jobqueue
sglang.author: RiversJin
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Refactor job queue implementation to eliminate lock contention and align with Rust async best practices.
The previous implementation used Arc<Mutex<Receiver>> with multiple worker tasks competing for the receiver, which:

Violates tokio mpsc design (single consumer pattern)
Introduces unn

Motivation
Currently, under deepseek3.2-DSA, prefill-ttft of long text sequences takes a long time. Introducing context parallel can reduce ttft.

Taking TP=EP=4 and DP=2 as an example (CP_SIZE==ATTEN_TP_SIZE):
Each DP accepts an independent request.

Purpose
Even if prefix caching is enabled, it cannot read caching in the following two scenarios:

prompt logprobs
all pooling

Otherwise, the output might be less than n_prompt_tokens.
skip_reading_caching can still write to caching to accelerate following requests
Address #27145 (comment)

vllm.title: Fix gpt oss weight loading with EP + bf16
vllm.author: ashors1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The signature for _load_weights_other is incorrect. The start and end indices are flipped, which casues an indexing issue when attempting to extract the weights on the current EP rank. This fixes the signature to be consistent with _load_weights_mxfp4.

vllm.title: [Model][QwenVL] Optimize `Qwen2_5_VisionAttention` q,k preparation
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This is a follow up on #28271 and #24511 and further optimizes the query/key splitting. It prevents the need to concatenate the queries and keys again before applying the rotary embeddings. Instead everything is handled with fast rearrange and slicing which don't require GPU ops.

Test Plan

vllm.title: Feature: Support Relu2 in FusedMoE fp8 cutlass path
vllm.author: amirkl94
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR enables FusedMoE FP8 cutlass path for models using non-gated relu2 models. This new path gives a performance gain of around 20% on output token throughput over the triton path.
This PR requires flashinfer 0.5.0 .
Tests
New parameterization in test_flashinfer.py::test_flashinfer_cutla

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix async scheduling + chunked prefill + preemption
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Small fix, took a while to track down 😅
The populated all_token_ids should never have been truncated since they are used to recover output ids following preemption in the async scheduling case.
